_description: Per-card narrative scores based on background significance. Name-level scores (section 1) are used as default. Special cases (section 2) override by matching name+artist or name+card_number within a set.

Pikachu with Grey Felt Hat.reason: Van Gogh Museum collaboration — one of the most unique PTCG crossovers ever. Extremely limited distribution.

Team Rocket's Mewtwo ex.reason: Team Rocket's Pokemon — iconic villain-owned Pokemon with nostalgic anime/game lore. SAR rarity.

Mewtwo V-UNION.reason: V-UNION 4-card assembly mechanic — only a handful of Pokemon got this. Mewtwo is the face of the mechanic.

Shining Lugia.reason: Shining Pokemon subset — special foil pattern from SM era. Fan-favorite legendary duo.

Shining Ho-Oh.reason: Shining Pokemon subset — paired with Shining Lugia. Special foil treatment.

Hop's Zacian ex.reason: Trainer's Pokemon mechanic debut (Journey Together). Hop is a major game character. SAR.

Charizard ex.reason: Modern Charizard SAR chase card — market-defining Pokemon in most desirable modern rarity.

Mega Dragonite ex.reason: Mega evolution return + Dragonite's first Mega. Fan-favorite pseudo-legendary power-up.

Pikachu VMAX.reason: Popular modern Pikachu variant but one of many Pika promos — not exceptionally rare.

Pikachu-EX.reason: EX-era Pikachu promo. Nostalgic mechanic but standard among Pika variants.

Mewtwo.reason: Classic Mewtwo by Sugimori — iconic base-set-era art by original Pokemon artist. Historical but common.

Mew.reason: Classic Mew promo. Beloved mythical but these early promos are straightforward.

Pikachu.reason: Standard Pikachu promo — one of many prints of the mascot.

Eevee.reason: Standard Eevee promo. Fan-favorite but produced in large quantities.

Rayquaza.reason: Fan-favorite legendary with strong design. Solid but not exceptional promo.

Ho-oh.reason: Classic Johto legendary phoenix. Arita's art captures the mythic feel.

Gyarados.reason: TOKIYA's unique art on the iconic rage-evolution Pokemon.

Jirachi.reason: Wish-making mythical. Cute but less market impact than Mew/Celebi.

Celebi.reason: Time-travel mythical. Gen 2 nostalgia helps but standard promo.

Arceus.reason: The God Pokemon — creator of the universe. Lore significance above typical promos.

Lucario.reason: Popular aura Pokemon. Standard promo treatment.

Snorlax.reason: Beloved Gen 1 chonky boy. Nostalgic but standard promo.

Darkrai.reason: Dark-type mythical with cool design. Standard promo.

Mimikyu.reason: Tragic backstory — wanted to be loved like Pikachu. Fan-resonant Gen 7 standout.

Zoroark.reason: Illusion fox Pokemon. Gen 5 standout but standard BW promo.

Salamence.reason: Pseudo-legendary dragon. Solid but unremarkable promo version.

Light Toxtricity.reason: Gen 8 punk-rock Pokemon. Less collector demand than earlier generations.

Alakazam ex.reason: Gen 1 psychic icon. Arita's art elevates this promo.

special_cases.name: Mewtwo
special_cases.reason: Christopher Rush is MTG's most iconic artist (Black Lotus). His only PTCG illustrations make this historically significant across TCG communities.

special_cases.name: Mewtwo
special_cases.reason: Benimaru Itoh's distinctive manga-influenced art style. Cult following.

special_cases.name: Pikachu
special_cases.reason: The very first Wizards Black Star Promo (#1). Historical milestone.

special_cases.name: Mewtwo
special_cases.reason: Sugimori's Mewtwo — the original Pokemon artist drawing the original legendary. Above-average for a standard promo.
